{"triageDiagnostic":{"fault_domain":"test-code","confidence":0.95,"evidence_summary":"All 3 remaining E2E failures are test-code issues, not code defects. Component verified working via Playwright MCP — all 10 data-testid attributes present, modal opens/closes correctly, Add to Cart produces confirmation dialog. Failures: (1) filterConsoleErrors misses 'r: 403 Forbidden' SDK error pattern — baseline sandbox noise from shopper-context/shopper-configurations APIs; (2) test expects testid 'added-to-cart-modal' but base template uses 'add-to-cart-modal'; (3) plp-single-variant-outfits fixture navigates to /category/womens-outfits which contains only product sets — quick-view triggers correctly excluded for sets, so test times out waiting for trigger.","failing_tests":["open-quick-view-modal (line 234): consoleErrors contains r: 403 Forbidden — add /r: 403 Forbidden/ to BASELINE_NOISE_PATTERNS","add-to-cart-from-quick-view (line 294): wrong testid added-to-cart-modal → should be add-to-cart-modal","single-variant-quick-view (line 411): outfits category has only product sets — use /category/womens-clothing-tops or /category/newarrivals instead"]}}

Reset cycle 3/5: [domain:test-code] [source:llm] All three remaining E2E failures stem from test-spec issues: a missing baseline noise pattern, a wrong testid selector, and a fixture category containing only product sets that lack quick-view triggers.. Reset items: e2e-author, e2e-runner, create-draft-pr, qa-adversary, code-cleanup, docs-archived, doc-architect, publish-pr
